title: Contemporary Matte Black House Number 7 - High Visibility Door Number Plaque for Wall Mounting - Weatherproof Outdoor House Numbers for Outside, Gates and Mailboxes (1-Pack)
features: 【Modern Matte Black Design】 Features a sleek contemporary finish that complements any home style, making these door numbers both elegant and highly visible.
【Dual Mounting Options】Includes strong 3M VHB adhesive tape and rust-resistant screws for easy installation on walls, doors, or gates without drilling.
【All-Weather Durability】Crafted from premium stainless steel with a protective coating, these house numbers for outside resist fading, corrosion, and harsh UK weather.
【Clear and Stylish Display】The raised numeric design creates a subtle shadow effect for improved readability day and night, perfect for address identification.
【Complete Single Pack】Contains one house number 7 plaque with all necessary hardware, offering a quick and hassle-free upgrade to your property’s entrance.
description: Product Description What You Receive: 1 x matte black number plate Pre-drilled ready for mounting All required screws included Perfect For: Modern and traditional homes Front doors, gates & walls Landlords and homeowners DIY exterior upgrades Why It’s a Great Choice: Create Your Full House Number Please note: this listing is for one single digit. Purchase each number individually to display your full house number. Classic & Clean Typography Features the timeless Times New Roman font in a muted matte black finish for a professional and elegant appearance. Weather & Fade Resistant Made from robust materials designed to withstand rain, sun, and wind without rusting, peeling, or fading. Easy to Install Pre-drilled holes and supplied screws allow quick fixing to timber, UPVC, composite, and brick surfaces. Ideal Modern Size Measures 7.5cm (H) x 5cm (W) – highly visible yet discreet enough to suit most UK house styles.
